About Me

Mechatronics Engineer passionate about industrial automation, robotics, embedded systems, and autonomous technologies.

Who I Am

I am Zeyad Mohamed Abbas Mohamed Belal, a Mechatronics Engineering graduate from Okan University in Istanbul, Turkey.

My interests focus on industrial automation, robotics, embedded systems, control systems, computer vision, and autonomous technologies. I enjoy designing and building complete engineering systems that combine mechanical design, electronics, programming, and automation into practical real-world solutions.

Education

Bachelor of Science in Mechatronics Engineering

Okan University, Istanbul, Turkey
Graduated: 2026

Relevant coursework included mechatronics systems, microcontrollers, control systems, embedded programming, sensors, and actuators.

Areas of Interest

Industrial Automation

PLC programming, HMI/SCADA systems, motor drives, classic control circuits, Factory IO simulation, and automation system design.

Robotics

Autonomous robots, mobile robotics, motion control, sensor-based navigation, and robotic system integration.

Embedded Systems

ESP32, Arduino, STM32, embedded C, sensor integration, motor control, and real-time control applications.

Mechanical Design

SolidWorks, AutoCAD, 3D modeling, mechanical assemblies, flow simulation, and manufacturing-oriented design.

Technical Skills

Industrial Automation

PLC, TIA Portal, WinCC, PLCSIM, Factory IO, EKTS, CADe_SIM, AC/DC Drives

Embedded Systems

ESP32, Arduino, STM32, STM32CubeIDE, Embedded C, Sensor Integration, Motor Control

Programming

Python, C, Embedded C, Ladder Logic, MATLAB

CAD & Design

SolidWorks, AutoCAD, 3D Modeling, Assembly Design, Flow Simulation

Engineering Software

MATLAB, STM32CubeIDE, Microsoft Office Suite, Arduino IDE

Current Focus

I am focused on developing my engineering skills in industrial automation, embedded systems, robotics, control systems, and system integration.

My work combines mechanical design, electronics, programming, automation, and practical problem solving to build complete mechatronic and robotic systems.

Software & Tools

TIA Portal
WinCC
STM32CubeIDE
Arduino IDE
MATLAB
Microsoft Office
SolidWorks

Python

Languages
